resources.string: Priority access to the most popular fields
On the main screen or in Explore, browse available fields in Lisbon. Tap a field to see details like location, price, and available times.
On the field details screen, choose your preferred day and time. Then tap Book Now to confirm. The reservation is automatically saved to your account.
Access the Reservations tab in the navigation bar to see all your reservations. You can filter between upcoming and past reservations.
In the Profile tab you can manage your information, view payment details, and access account settings.
Payment is processed securely through the card registered to your account. The price of each reservation is shown on the field details screen.
If you have any issues with the app or a reservation, contact us at suporte@rentaball.pt. We reply within 24 hours.

By using the RENTABALL app, the user declares to have read, understood and fully accepted these Terms and Conditions. If you disagree with any of the terms presented here, you must immediately cease use of the application.

RENTABALL is a football field booking platform in Lisbon and surrounding areas. We act as intermediaries between users and field operators, facilitating the booking, payment, and schedule management process.

To use RENTABALL services, you must create an account with a valid email address and a secure password. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your access credentials and for all activities carried out with your account. In case of unauthorized access, you must notify us immediately.

Reservations are confirmed after the payment process is completed. You may cancel a reservation up to 24 hours before the scheduled time at no additional cost. Cancellations made less than 24 hours in advance may be subject to a 50% cancellation fee of the total reservation value.

All payments are processed securely through our certified payment partners. The prices shown include VAT at the current legal rate. RENTABALL reserves the right to change prices at any time, but already confirmed reservations will not be affected by such changes.

The user agrees to use the reserved facilities responsibly and to respect the rules of each field. Damage caused to the facilities during the reservation period is the user\'s responsibility. Appropriate sports footwear is mandatory.

Personal data collected is processed in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). We use your data exclusively to manage reservations and to improve the app experience. We never share your data with third parties without your explicit consent.

RENTABALL is not liable for injuries or accidents occurring during the use of reserved fields, for weather conditions that prevent the use of facilities, or for any indirect damages resulting from the use of the platform.

RENTABALL reserves the right to update these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon publication in the application. Continued use of the platform after publication of changes implies acceptance of the new terms.
For any questions related to these Terms and Conditions, you can contact us at suporte@rentaball.pt or by phone +351 210 000 000, available Monday to Friday, from 9am to 6pm.
